attributes.action: Add cages to all motorway bridges. Make them safe.
attributes.additional_details: Stop motorway incidents. Families of people in crisis and those who witness these incidents are forever changed and this can be stopped. We can make a proactive change to add cages surrounding the bridges preventing the ability for incidents.
attributes.background: Add cages around all motorway bridges to prevent crisis jumping. Make bridges safe and stop this method of harm.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Install fences and barriers on bridges over motorways to help prevent suicide
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/759398
